name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ32)
description: Measures 32 personality characteristics relevant to workplace behavior. Predicts job performance, leadership, teamwork, and cultural fit.

name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Assesses ability to interpret and analyze numerical data, graphs, and tables. Used for roles requiring data analysis and financial reasoning.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures ability to evaluate and interpret written information. Essential for roles requiring strong communication and comprehension skills.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Assesses ability to identify patterns and rules from abstract information. Measures problem-solving and logical thinking.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to apply rules and make logical decisions. Used for roles requiring analytical and structured thinking.

name: Verify G+ General Ability
description: Combines numerical, inductive, and deductive reasoning into a single adaptive test. Measures overall cognitive ability for professional roles.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Assesses factors that increase or decrease an individual's motivation at work. Useful for roles where drive and engagement are critical.

name: Customer Contact Styles Questionnaire (CCSQ)
description: Measures personality traits relevant to customer service and contact center roles. Predicts service quality and customer interaction style.

name: Sales Achievement Predictor (SalesAP)
description: Predicts sales performance by measuring personality traits and attitudes linked to success in sales roles.

name: Situational Judgment Test (SJT)
description: Presents realistic workplace scenarios and measures judgment and decision-making. Used across many roles to assess behavioral competencies.

name: Java Programming (New)
description: Tests knowledge and skills in Java programming including OOP concepts, data structures, algorithms, and Java-specific frameworks.

name: Python (New)
description: Evaluates Python programming skills including scripting, OOP, data handling, and standard libraries.

name: SQL (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of SQL including queries, joins, aggregations, and database management concepts.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Tests JavaScript programming knowledge including ES6+, DOM manipulation, async programming, and frameworks.

name: C++ (New)
description: Evaluates C++ programming skills including memory management, OOP, STL, and systems-level programming.

name: Microsoft .NET (New)
description: Tests .NET framework knowledge including C#, ASP.NET, and enterprise application development.

name: Automata - Fix (Coding Simulation)
description: Coding simulation where candidates fix broken code. Tests debugging skills, code comprehension, and problem-solving in real coding environments.

name: Automata Pro (Coding Simulation)
description: Advanced coding simulation requiring candidates to write code from scratch. Tests software engineering skills across multiple languages.

name: Financial Accounting (New)
description: Measures knowledge of financial accounting principles including balance sheets, P&L, and financial statements.

name: Numerical Reasoning (Calculation)
description: Tests speed and accuracy of numerical calculations. Suited for clerical, administrative, and data entry roles.

name: Verbal Reasoning (Comprehension)
description: Measures ability to understand and interpret written information at a basic level. Suitable for clerical and administrative roles.

name: Checking (Clerical)
description: Assesses speed and accuracy in checking and comparing data. Used for clerical, data entry, and administrative roles.

name: Management and Graduate Item Bank (MGIB)
description: Comprehensive cognitive ability test bank for graduate and management roles. Covers numerical, verbal, and abstract reasoning.

name: Graduate Item Bank (GIB)
description: Cognitive ability assessments specifically designed for graduate-level recruitment across numerical, verbal, and abstract domains.

name: Work Strengths (Personality)
description: Short personality questionnaire measuring key work-related strengths and preferences. Suitable for volume hiring and frontline roles.

name: Mechanical Comprehension (MCT2)
description: Assesses understanding of mechanical and physical principles. Used for engineering, technical, and manufacturing roles.

name: Spatial Reasoning
description: Measures ability to visualize and mentally manipulate shapes and objects. Used for technical, engineering, and design roles.

name: Microsoft Excel (Office)
description: Tests practical knowledge of Microsoft Excel including formulas, pivot tables, and data analysis features.

name: Microsoft Word (Office)
description: Evaluates practical knowledge of Microsoft Word for document creation, formatting, and editing.

name: Leadership Report (OPQ-based)
description: Derived from OPQ32, provides a detailed report on leadership potential and style across key leadership competencies.

name: Universal Competency Report (UCR)
description: OPQ-based report mapping personality traits to universal competencies. Used for selection and development across levels.
